zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan Bedlisgate於1390年出生在英國越可爾葛拉芙頓時，她的父親John Bedlisgate II26歲，母親Joan de Beauchamp25歲。她於1403年與Sir Richard Woodville在英國肯特麥德斯同結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和6個女兒的父母。她去世於1448年7月17日在她的家鄉享年58歲，埋葬在英國肯特麥德斯同。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joan Bedlisgate于1390年出生在英国越可爾葛拉芙頓时，她的父亲John Bedlisgate II26岁，母亲Joan de Beauchamp25岁。她于1403年与Sir Richard Woodville在英国肯特麥德斯同结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和6个女儿的父母。她去世于1448年7月17日在她的家乡享年58岁，埋葬在英国肯特麥德斯同。

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Joan Bedlisgate was born in 1390, in Grafton, Yorkshire, England, her father, John Bedlisgate II, was 26 and her mother, Joan de Beauchamp, was 25. She married Sir Richard Woodville in 1403, in Maidstone, Kent, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 6 daughters. She died on 17 July 1448, in her hometown, at the age of 58, and was buried in Maidstone, Kent, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joan Bedlisgate est née en 1390, à Grafton, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, John Bedlisgate II, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Joan de Beauchamp, avait 25 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Richard Woodville en 1403, à Maidstone, Kent, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 6 filles. Elle est décédée le 17 juillet 1448, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 58 ans, et a été enterrée à Maidstone, Kent, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joan Bedlisgate 1390 in Grafton, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Bedlisgate II 26 und ihre Mutter Joan de Beauchamp 25. Sie hat 1403 in Maidstone, Kent, England Sir Richard Woodville geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 6 Töchter. Sie starb am 17. Juli 1448 im Alter von 58 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in Maidstone, Kent, England begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: Joan Bedlisgateが1390年にイギリスヨークシュアイアグラフトンで生まれた時，父John Bedlisgate IIは26歳，母Joan de Beauchampは25歳であった。1403年にイギリスケントメイドストーンでSir Richard Woodvilleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼女は1448年7月17日に故郷で58歳で死去し，イギリスケントメイドストーンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Joan Bedlisgate(이)가 1390년 영국 요르크실르 그라프턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Bedlisgate II(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan de Beauchamp(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 1403년 영국 켄트 메이드스톤에서 Sir Richard Woodville(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1448년 7월 17일 그녀의 고향에서 58세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 켄트 메이드스톤에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Bedlisgate nasceu em 1390, em Grafton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Bedlisgate II, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Joan de Beauchamp, tinha 25 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Richard Woodville em 1403, em Maidstone, Kent, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 6 filhas. Ela faleceu em 17 de julho de 1448, em sua cidade natal, com 58 anos, e foi sepultada em Maidstone, Kent, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan Bedlisgate родилась в 1390 г. в местности графтон, еркшир, Англия, её отцу по имени John Bedlisgate II было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan de Beauchamp, 25. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Richard Woodville в 1403 г. в местности меидстоун, кэнт, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 6 дочерей. Она умерла 17 июля 1448 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 58 лет и была похоронена в местности меидстоун, кэнт, Англия.
